best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-document-010 title: adding document with spaces module: aggiungi documento source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the document process. test data: document name: test document, document description: this is a test document. test steps: 1. enter the document name "test document". 2. enter the document description "this is a test document". 3. tap on the "save" button. expected result: the document should be added to the process and a success message should be displayed.

item_text: si/no — decision node. if "si" is selected, the flow continues to the next state. if "no" is selected, the flow goes to the next alternative.
